title: Raising Bulls Clinch League Title in Thrilling Final
author: NC Bulls Media
excerpt: In a nail-biting finish at WakeMed Soccer Park, the Raising Bulls defended 168 to win their third consecutive league title with a 26-run victory over Greensboro Lions.
content:
The Raising Bulls put in a commanding performance at WakeMed Soccer Park on Saturday, defending a total of 168/4 to claim their third consecutive league title with a 26-run victory over Greensboro Lions.

Ravi Sharma's explosive 65 off 42 balls set the tone at the top, while Deepak Mehta's crucial 38 off 24 balls in the death overs pushed the total past the 165 mark. In reply, Greensboro never got going against a disciplined NC Bulls bowling attack, with Akash Nair and Vijay Patel claiming two wickets each.

Head coach expressed his pride: 'This team has shown incredible resilience all season. Three titles in a row speaks for itself.'

Ravi Sharma was named Man of the Match for his match-winning innings.

title: Royal Bulls Edge RTP Royals in Close Encounter
author: NC Bulls Media
excerpt: Manish Verma's all-round brilliance guided Royal Bulls to a 16-run win over RTP Royals, with both bat and ball making the difference on a slow Morrisville pitch.
content:
Manish Verma produced one of the performances of the season as Royal Bulls beat RTP Royals by 16 runs at Morrisville Community Park.

Verma's 42 off 28 balls helped rescue a stuttering innings after Royal Bulls lost three quick wickets in the powerplay. His 38-run stand with Kiran Reddy proved crucial as the team posted 154/6.

In a disciplined bowling display, Verma then claimed three wickets including the dangerous RTP opener to keep the chase in check. The opponent finished on 138/9 — 16 runs short.

title: NC Bulls Announces 2026 Season Schedule
author: NC Bulls Admin
excerpt: Both Raising Bulls and Royal Bulls are set for a packed 2026 NC Cricket League season, with fixtures announced across Cary, Durham, and Morrisville venues.
content:
NC Bulls Cricket Club is excited to announce the full schedule for the 2026 season, with both the Raising Bulls and Royal Bulls taking part in the NC Cricket League.

Both teams will play across premier venues including WakeMed Soccer Park in Cary, Morrisville Community Park, and Southern Community Park in Durham.

The season runs from March through August, with the league finals scheduled for late August. Supporters are encouraged to come out and cheer both teams.

For the full fixture list, visit the Fixtures page.

title: New Player Registration Open for 2026 Season
author: NC Bulls Admin
excerpt: NC Bulls Cricket Club is accepting registrations for new players for both Raising Bulls and Royal Bulls squads. All skill levels are welcome to try out.
content:
NC Bulls Cricket Club is proud to open player registrations for the 2026 cricket season. We welcome players of all skill levels — from beginners looking to learn the game to experienced cricketers looking for competitive play.

Both the Raising Bulls and Royal Bulls squads have limited spots available. Trials will be held at WakeMed Soccer Park, Cary, on the last Saturday of February.

To register, use the Contact / Join Us form on our website. Please mention your preferred position and availability.

Join us in building the strongest NC Bulls lineup yet!
